# TalentScreen

> An AI-powered hiring portal for candidates, recruiters, and hiring managers — post jobs, apply with a resume, run AI candidate screening, and make confident hiring decisions.

TalentScreen brings job posting, applications, AI resume screening, AI job-match scoring, and interview question generation into one role-based platform. Candidates browse and apply to roles and track their application status; recruiters post jobs and review AI-screened candidates; hiring managers review shortlists and make decisions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TalentScreen's AI hiring and candidate screening features.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a TalentScreen account.
